positive.stdout:
% Refutation found. Thanks to Tanya!
% SZS status Theorem for positive
% SZS output start Proof for positive
1. hosted_2008_summer_olympics(beijing) [input(axiom)]
2. hosted_winter_olympics(beijing) [input(axiom)]
3. hosted_2008_summer_olympics(beijing) & hosted_winter_olympics(beijing) [input(conjecture)]
4. ~(hosted_2008_summer_olympics(beijing) & hosted_winter_olympics(beijing)) [negated conjecture 3]
5. ~hosted_2008_summer_olympics(beijing) | ~hosted_winter_olympics(beijing) [ennf transformation 4]
6. hosted_2008_summer_olympics(beijing) [cnf transformation 1]
7. hosted_winter_olympics(beijing) [cnf transformation 2]
8. ~hosted_2008_summer_olympics(beijing) | ~hosted_winter_olympics(beijing) [cnf transformation 5]
10. 1 <=> hosted_winter_olympics(beijing) [avatar definition]
14. 2 <=> hosted_2008_summer_olympics(beijing) [avatar definition]
17. ~1 | ~2 [avatar split clause 8,14,10]
18. 1 [avatar split clause 7,10]
19. 2 [avatar split clause 6,14]
s1. ~2 | ~1 [sat_conversion 17]
s2. 1 [sat_conversion 18]
s3. 2 [sat_conversion 19]
s4. # [rat s1,s2,s3]
20. $false [avatar sat refutation s4]
% SZS output end Proof for positive
% Termination reason: Refutation

negative.stdout:
